task:
Use subagents to achieve this task:
subagent1: collect the most recently added CVEs in the CISA KEV database via https://vulnerability.circl.lu/api/cisa_kev/ (expected_report: the CVE ids and summary you found, as a short list)
subagent2: collect the most recently added CVEs in the GitHub Advisories database via https://api.github.com/advisories (expected_report: the CVE ids and summary you found, as a short list)
Then summarize both into one markdown table.
